message:
test(conformance): add RNG adversarial edge cases

- Add 2 new RNG adversarial cases: zero pool size, whitespace mode
- Update coverage: RNG adversarial 41→43, total 89→91

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 | I/O (npy/npz/text) | 66 | 38 | 33 | 137 | Good - parser boundaries covered |
 | Linear algebra | 63 | 28 | 35 | 126 | Good - core decompositions, 1x1 edge cases, identity |
 | String arrays | 65 | — | — | 65 | Good - 33 char functions, empty/pattern edge cases |
-| RNG | 22 | 26 | 41 | 89 | Adequate + 39 statistical |
+| RNG | 22 | 26 | 43 | 91 | Adequate + 39 statistical |
 | FFT | 41 | — | — | 41 | Good - transform families, edge sizes, 2D/3D, fftn/ifftn |
 | Datetime/timedelta | 42 | — | — | 42 | Good - arithmetic, busday, NaT, broadcast, abs, comparisons |
 | Masked arrays | 40 | — | — | 40 | Good - reshape/concat/fill/broadcast/all-masked/argmin-max/axis-aware |

@@ -672,5 +672,38 @@
       "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/rng_adversarial_cases.json"
     ],
     "reason_code": "rng_policy_unknown_metadata"
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "rng_seedsequence_pool_size_zero_strict",
+    "operation": "seedsequence_pool_size_invalid",
+    "expected_error_contains": "seed sequence state generation contract violated",
+    "expected_reason_code": "rng_seedsequence_generate_state_failed",
+    "severity": "critical",
+    "seed": 7245,
+    "pool_size": 0,
+    "mode": "strict",
+    "env_fingerprint": "fnp-random-packet-f",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-007/contract_table.md",
+      "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/rng_adversarial_cases.json"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "rng_seedsequence_generate_state_failed"
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "rng_policy_metadata_whitespace_mode",
+    "operation": "policy_metadata_unknown",
+    "expected_error_contains": "unknown mode/class metadata rejected fail-closed",
+    "expected_reason_code": "rng_policy_unknown_metadata",
+    "severity": "medium",
+    "seed": 7246,
+    "mode": "hardened",
+    "mode_raw": "   ",
+    "class_raw": "known_compatible_low_risk",
+    "env_fingerprint": "fnp-random-packet-f",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-007/contract_table.md",
+      "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/rng_adversarial_cases.json"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "rng_policy_unknown_metadata"
   }
 ]
